title: Writing a formal email
explanation:
Writing a formal email (A2)

  • Start: Dear Mr/Ms + surname,
  • First line: reason for writing
  • Polite language: I would like to… / Could you please…?
  • End: Yours sincerely, (if you know the name) or Yours faithfully,

questions.text: Reason for writing: [*I am writing to enquire about…|I write because I want…|Tell me about…]
Polite request: [*Could you please send me…?|Send me…|You must send…]
Thank you for your ____. | *email | quick | hey
I look forward to ____ from you. | *hearing | hear | heard
Please find the document ____. | *attached | attach | attaching
I ____ grateful for your help. | *would be | am want | will to be
[*I am writing in connection with…|I write stuff about…|About the thing…]
[*Please do not hesitate to contact me.|Call me now!!!|Phone fast.]
If you don't know the person's name: [*Yours faithfully,|Yours sincerely,|Best wishes,]
[*I would appreciate a reply by Friday.|Answer me Friday.|Reply Friday now.]
